nodes.name: agents.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive REST API client for agent management, covering CRUD operations, lifecycle controls (pause/resume/terminate), instructions bundles, skills, API keys, runtime state, adapter model discovery, and agent wakeup invocation within company scope.

nodes.name: approvals.ts
nodes.summary: Minimal REST API client for the approvals resource, exposing the approvalsApi object for listing and managing agent approval requests.

nodes.name: cloud-upstream.ts
nodes.summary: API client module for cloud upstream integration (file not present in current checkout; likely moved or renamed to cloudUpstreams.ts).

nodes.name: companies.ts
nodes.summary: REST API client for company resource management, providing CRUD operations and member/settings endpoints grouped under the companiesApi namespace.

nodes.name: goals.ts
nodes.summary: Minimal REST API client for the goals resource, exposing goalsApi for listing and managing company-scoped goals.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel entry point for the ui/src/api layer, re-exporting all domain API clients (agents, companies, issues, routines, goals, plugins, etc.) so consumers can import from a single location.

nodes.name: issues.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive REST API client for the issues resource, supporting rich filtering (status, assignee, project, labels, workspace), CRUD, comments, documents, attachments, feedback, approvals, recovery actions, and tree-control operations.

nodes.name: plugins.ts
nodes.summary: Frontend API client for the plugin system, mapping 1:1 to server plugin REST endpoints for install, update, delete, UI contributions, health checks, and launcher context snapshots.

nodes.name: projects.ts
nodes.summary: REST API client for project management providing CRUD operations with optional company scope, using path-building helpers for clean URL construction.

nodes.name: resource-memberships.ts
nodes.summary: API client module for resource membership management (file not present in current checkout; likely moved or renamed to resourceMemberships.ts).

nodes.name: routines.ts
nodes.summary: REST API client for routine management covering CRUD, revision history, restore, trigger lifecycle (create/update/delete/rotate secret), run invocation, and aggregated activity fetching across routine-related entities.

nodes.name: runs.ts
nodes.summary: Minimal API client module for agent run resources (file not present in current checkout).

nodes.name: secrets.ts
nodes.summary: REST API client for secrets management, providing CRUD and rotation operations for company-scoped and agent-scoped secret values.

nodes.name: users.ts
nodes.summary: API client module for user resource operations (file not present in current checkout).

nodes.name: workspaces.ts
nodes.summary: API client module for workspace management operations (file not present in current checkout).

nodes.name: AgentAccessSettings.tsx
nodes.summary: React component for managing agent access and permission settings, allowing configuration of which users or roles can interact with a given agent (file not present in current checkout).

nodes.name: AgentDetailModal.tsx
nodes.summary: Large React modal component presenting full agent details, configuration, and action controls for viewing and editing a specific agent's properties (file not present in current checkout).

nodes.name: AgentDetailModalPublish.tsx
nodes.summary: React sub-component within the AgentDetailModal handling the publish/promote flow for making an agent configuration active (file not present in current checkout).

nodes.name: AgentList.tsx
nodes.summary: React component rendering a list of agents within a company, with status indicators and navigation to individual agent details (file not present in current checkout).

nodes.name: AgentMemberships.tsx
nodes.summary: React component managing an agent's project or resource memberships, enabling addition and removal of the agent from various organizational scopes (file not present in current checkout).

nodes.name: AgentSelector.tsx
nodes.summary: React dropdown/search component for selecting an agent from the available list within a company, used in issue assignment and other agent-selection contexts (file not present in current checkout).

nodes.name: AppLogo.tsx
nodes.summary: Simple React component rendering the Paperclip application logo, used in navigation bars and branding surfaces (file not present in current checkout).

nodes.name: BoardView.tsx
nodes.summary: React kanban-style board view component for issues, organizing cards by status columns with drag-and-drop or click-based status transitions (file not present in current checkout).

nodes.name: CloudUpstreamModal.tsx
nodes.summary: React modal component for configuring cloud upstream sync connections, allowing users to link a local Paperclip instance with a cloud-hosted upstream (file not present in current checkout).

nodes.name: CompanySelector.tsx
nodes.summary: React component providing a company picker UI, allowing users to switch between companies they have access to within the Paperclip platform (file not present in current checkout).
